docs_updated: Placed three documentation surfaces verbatim for bundle-683-684-685 (no authored/paraphrased/invented prose). (2) EDITED CHANGELOG.md — inserted the three dictated bullets (#683 simultaneous-failed-gates journal re-bind transaction, #684 restored mutation-killing coverage for the #682 fail-closed paths, #685 writeFileAtomicReplace parent-directory fsync) verbatim under `## [Unreleased]` -> `### Fixed`, in order immediately ABOVE the existing #682 bullet (new order: #683, #684, #685, then #682); the #682 bullet and the `### Documentation` subsection left untouched. (3) EDITED docs/api.md (~line 1346) — replaced the old R17 deferral paragraph ("does not fsync the parent directory afterward; that is the pre-existing deferred R17 durability follow-up... not changed by D-682-01") with the dictated replacement stating the helper now fsyncs the parent directory after rename (R17 closed by #685, see D-683-01; directory fsync platform fail-soft, never turns an accepted write into a refusal, never swallows a real rename/ENOSPC error). VALIDATION: `node scripts/simulate-workflow-walkthrough.js` printed "Workflow walkthrough simulation passed" and exited 0. `git status --short` shows my write set: docs/decisions/D-683-01.md (untracked/new), CHANGELOG.md + docs/api.md (modified), plus this evidence .cache file. The other modified files — scripts/kaola-workflow-adaptive-node.js (x4 editions: canonical + gitlab/gitea/plugin forge ports) and scripts/test-adaptive-node.js — are the EXPECTED accumulated bundle diff from the already-completed n1-fix node (R7/R8 fix), NOT files this doc node touched (confirmed by the coordinator). This is a prose-only docs task: the walkthrough is the relevant fast check; the four-chain (claude/codex/gitlab/gitea) obligation is owned by the finalize node, not run here.
